section.title: Step 1: Configure pytest-django
section.p: Action: Add [tool.pytest.ini_options] with DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE, addopts, markers.

section.title: Step 2: Author factories
section.p: Action: Create one DjangoModelFactory per model in tests/factories.py with SubFactory and Faker.
Output: tests/factories.py with one factory per model.

section.title: Step 3: Register factories
section.p: Action: Call register(...) for each factory in tests/conftest.py.

section.title: Step 4: Add API client fixtures
section.p: Action: Define api_client, authed_client, staff_client in conftest.py.

section.title: Step 5: Write feature tests
section.p: Action: Write model/service/selector/view tests. Use format='json'. Assert status + body fields.

section.title: Step 6: Add permission matrix
section.p: Output: One parametrized test per endpoint covering the role/status matrix.

section.title: Step 7: Wire coverage + CI
section.p: Action: Add --cov, threshold, and CI job.
